name: Racing Limits
description: An infinite arcade racing game where you weave through heavy highway traffic. Test your reflexes across multiple game modes including career, infinite, and time-trial variations.

name: Drive mad
description: Drive Mad is an addictive, physics-based racing and puzzle game developed by Martin Magni.

name: Trees Hate You
description: Trees Hate You is an absurd, comedy-focused rage game where you attempt to walk home after a peaceful picnic.

name: Dad N' Me
description: The classic, fast-paced Newgrounds beat-'em-up game where you control a purple skull-faced bully unleashing chaos on the local playground.

name: Service Desk Simulator
description: A Service Desk Simulator is an interactive training and practice platform designed to mirror real-world IT support environments.

name: Car game
description: A physics-based minimalist driving game where you control the speed, steering, and movement entirely with your mouse.

name: Planet No more
description: A fast-paced celestial survival game where planets are collapsing around you and every move counts.

name: Deepest Sword
description: Deepest Sword is a free, physics-based indie game developed by Cosmic Adventure Squad.

name: Scritchy Scratchy
description: Scritchy Scratchy is a super-satisfying scratch card incremental game where luck is your weapon, and glittering riches are just a scratch away.

name: Touhou Exchange
description: Produced for 9-Jam and Cirno Day, this is a Touhou remake of Money Puzzle/Idol Exchangers, a 1997 arcade game by Face. Updated to v4 (Teamplay).

name: Drive Quest
description: Put your steering and navigation skills to the test in a stylized arcade driving challenge.
